name: BigBlueButton
researched_as: BigBlueButton web conferencing and classroom platform
license: LGPL / mixed component licenses; verify deployment bundle terms if redistributing
what: Open-source virtual classroom and web conferencing platform with breakout rooms, whiteboards, recordings, polls, and LMS integrations.
solves: Structured online classes, webinars, and teaching sessions beyond simple meetings.
users: Education, training, and webinar operators who need classroom-grade features.
fit: Potentially useful for protocol classes or guided sessions, but operationally heavy. Jitsi is likely the simpler default unless classroom-specific features are truly required.
runtime: Multi-service stack on dedicated Ubuntu with media services, TURN/STUN, recordings, and web application components.
components: Web app, SFU/media services, recording stack, Redis/DB/services, TURN/STUN, and optional integrations.
deploy: Officially prefers a clean dedicated Ubuntu server. This is not a casual sidecar deployment.
deps: Dedicated compute, bandwidth, TURN/STUN, storage for recordings, TLS, and careful capacity planning.
datastores: Application services with DB/storage and recording artifacts.
auth: Meeting/user roles and integrations with external systems/LMS/auth depending on deployment.
apis: Meeting APIs, recordings, integrations, and web conferencing endpoints.
security: Media, recordings, guest access, and public meeting surfaces require strong operational discipline.
setup_path: Only adopt if Hylono needs formal classroom features. Use official install docs on dedicated infrastructure.
env: Domain, TLS, TURN/STUN, recording storage, external auth/integration config, and capacity settings.
persistence: Back up configs and recordings as required; recordings can be storage-heavy and privacy-sensitive.
operations: Capacity planning, upgrades, TURN/STUN, recording management, and live-ops support are significant.
failure_points: Underestimating media ops and using BBB when lighter meeting tooling would suffice.
integration: Could support education/training programs or internal sessions, but it is not an early-stack priority.
verify: Confirm whether Hylono really needs classroom-grade features rather than simple video meetings.
gdpr: Recordings and participant data are privacy-sensitive. Retention and consent are critical.
recommendation: LATE / ONLY IF CLASSROOM FEATURES ARE REQUIRED
overlap: Jitsi is the lighter alternative for general meetings.
codex_read_first: Read Jitsi and BBB together before making any video-platform recommendation.
codex_best_path: Prefer Jitsi for basic meetings; choose BBB only for formal training/classroom requirements.
codex_never_assume: Never assume conferencing equals classroom infrastructure.
